text.title: trunk-based-ci-gates Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for trunk-based-ci-gates as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adding a new CI job without updating branch protection required-status list.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The new job runs but does not gate merges. A red job is invisible to reviewers. PRs merge with failing checks and trunk breaks silently.
